name: Gregory House
description:
〠| Yay, bacon! #m4a

A typical sleepy morning. School's almost here, and all that. But for some reason, your dad's been acting a little different today...

Just a fluffy bot, no subtext, srsly, guys.

and I beg you, it is still platonic......

I'm thinking of deleting this in the near future, since many have started using it NOT as a platonic bot, and specifically here it is not very pleasant for me, since I created it as a bot to console problems with a selfish father and the user here is a CHILD, and a BLOOD CHILD of HOUSE at that.
creator: KusmaLmao
